summary: Iteration 101 - All 7 features tested and PASSED. Frontend-only testing for AddParcelPage and REDDTrackingPage auto-fill farmer info when navigated from agent's farmer profile.
critical_code_review_comments: AddParcelPage correctly reads farmer_id/farmer_name from URL searchParams and shows emerald info card when isFromAgent=true
AddParcelPage shows blue member dropdown section when no farmer params provided
REDDTrackingPage correctly shows farmer info card (emerald background) when paramFarmerName exists
REDDTrackingPage shows editable inputs (farmer-name-input, farmer-phone-input) when no params provided
Agent registration form shows 'L'agriculteur sera automatiquement inscrit dans votre cooperative' text and has NO cooperative_code field
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 101 features verified working. AddParcelPage and REDDTrackingPage correctly auto-fill farmer info when navigated with URL params. Agent registration form correctly shows auto-inscription text without cooperative_code field.

frontend: TEST 1: AddParcelPage WITH params (?farmer_id=X&farmer_name=Y) - shows farmer name card (emerald bg), hides dropdown - PASSED
TEST 2: AddParcelPage WITHOUT params - shows member dropdown (blue bg), no farmer card - PASSED
TEST 3: REDDTrackingPage WITH params (?farmer=X&phone=Y&id=Z) - shows farmer info card (emerald bg), hides editable inputs - PASSED
TEST 4: REDDTrackingPage WITHOUT params - shows editable inputs (farmer-name-input, farmer-phone-input), no farmer card - PASSED
TEST 5: AddParcelPage back button uses navigate(-1) - navigates away from page - PASSED
TEST 6: Agent login and registration form - shows 'automatiquement inscrit dans votre cooperative' text, NO cooperative_code field - PASSED
TEST 7: Agent dashboard shows 9 Planteurs - PASSED

addparcel_with_params.expected: Farmer info card with emerald background, no member dropdown
addparcel_with_params.result: PASSED - Farmer card visible with 'Konan Yao Pierre' and 'Parcelle liee automatiquement a cet agriculteur' text

addparcel_without_params.expected: Member dropdown with blue background, no farmer card
addparcel_without_params.result: PASSED - Member dropdown visible, blue section visible, no farmer card

redd_with_params.expected: Farmer info card with emerald background, no editable inputs
redd_with_params.result: PASSED - Farmer card visible with name and phone, no farmer-name-input or farmer-phone-input

redd_without_params.expected: Editable inputs for farmer name and phone, no farmer card
redd_without_params.result: PASSED - farmer-name-input and farmer-phone-input visible, no farmer card

agent_registration_form.description: Registration form shows auto-inscription text, no cooperative_code field
agent_registration_form.result: PASSED - Text 'L'agriculteur sera automatiquement inscrit dans votre cooperative' visible, form has only: Nom complet, Telephone, Village, PIN 4 chiffres, Hectares
